channel.title: Context Engineering Daily - RAG & Retrieval
channel.description: Latest RAG & Retrieval news in Context Engineering

item.title: Disaster Question Answering with LoRA Efficiency and Accurate End Position
item.description: arXiv:2602.21212v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Natural disasters such as earthquakes, torrential rainfall, floods, and volcanic eruptions occur with extremely low frequency and affect limited geographic areas. When individuals face disaster situations, they often experience confusion and lack the ...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> context, arxiv, experiment, model, large language model | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: Reasoning-Based Personalized Generation for Users with Sparse Data
item.description: arXiv:2602.21219v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Large Language Model (LLM) personalization holds great promise for tailoring responses by leveraging personal context and history. However, real-world users usually possess sparse interaction histories with limited personal context, such as cold-start...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> context, augmented, arxiv, LLM, reasoning | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: Task-Aware LoRA Adapter Composition via Similarity Retrieval in Vector Databases
item.description: arXiv:2602.21222v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Parameter efficient fine tuning methods like LoRA have enabled task specific adaptation of large language models, but efficiently composing multiple specialized adapters for unseen tasks remains challenging. We present a novel framework for dynamic Lo...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> retrieval, arxiv, vector, reasoning, example | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: Make Every Draft Count: Hidden State based Speculative Decoding
item.description: arXiv:2602.21224v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Speculative decoding has emerged as a pivotal technique to accelerate LLM inference by employing a lightweight draft model to generate candidate tokens that are subsequently verified by the target model in parallel. However, while this paradigm succes...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> memory, arxiv, LLM, model, RAG | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: The ASIR Courage Model: A Phase-Dynamic Framework for Truth Transitions in Human and AI Systems
item.description: arXiv:2602.21745v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We introduce the ASIR (Awakened Shared Intelligence Relationship) Courage Model, a phase-dynamic framework that formalizes truth-disclosure as a state transition rather than a personality trait. The mode characterizes the shift from suppression (S0) t...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> context, arxiv, alignment, model, RAG | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: Prompt Architecture Determines Reasoning Quality: A Variable Isolation Study on the Car Wash Problem
item.description: arXiv:2602.21814v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Large language models consistently fail the "car wash problem," a viral reasoning benchmark requiring implicit physical constraint inference. We present a variable isolation study (n=20 per condition, 6 conditions, 120 total trials) examining which pr...<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> arXiv | <strong>Keywords:</strong> context, retrieval, arxiv, vector, reasoning | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (arXiv)

item.title: airweave - Open-source context retrieval layer for AI agents
item.description: Open-source context retrieval layer for AI agents<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> GitHub | <strong>Keywords:</strong> context, retrieval | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (GitHub)

item.title: LightRAG - [EMNLP2025] "LightRAG: Simple and Fast Retrieval-Augmented Generation"
item.description: [EMNLP2025] "LightRAG: Simple and Fast Retrieval-Augmented Generation"<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> GitHub | <strong>Keywords:</strong> RAG, augmented, retrieval | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (GitHub)

item.title: KAG - KAG is a logical form-guided reasoning and retrieval framework based on OpenSPG engine and LLMs. It is used to build logical reasoning and factual Q&A solutions for professional domain knowledge bases. It can effectively overcome the shortcomings of the traditional RAG vector similarity calculation model.
item.description: KAG is a logical form-guided reasoning and retrieval framework based on OpenSPG engine and LLMs. It is used to build logical reasoning and factual Q&A solutions for professional domain knowledge bases. It can effectively overcome the shortcomings of the traditional RAG vector similarity calculation model.<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> GitHub | <strong>Keywords:</strong> retrieval, vector, reasoning, LLM, model | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (GitHub)

item.title: Kiln - Build, Evaluate, and Optimize AI Systems. Includes evals, RAG, agents, fine-tuning, synthetic data generation, dataset management, MCP, and more.
item.description: Build, Evaluate, and Optimize AI Systems. Includes evals, RAG, agents, fine-tuning, synthetic data generation, dataset management, MCP, and more.<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> GitHub | <strong>Keywords:</strong> RAG, fine-tuning | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
item.author: noreply@contextengineering.news (GitHub)

item.title: graphrag - A modular graph-based Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) system

item.title: R2R - SoTA production-ready AI retrieval system. Agentic Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) with a RESTful API.
item.description: SoTA production-ready AI retrieval system. Agentic Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) with a RESTful API.<br><br><small><strong>Source:</strong> GitHub | <strong>Keywords:</strong> augmented, retrieval, product, RAG, API | <strong>Relevance:</strong> 100%</small>
